name: IR Canopy Sensor (CWSI)
description: Infrared thermometer for measuring canopy temperature to calculate Crop Water Stress Index (CWSI). Publishes leafTemperature in °C via MQTT. The crop-health engine computes CWSI = (Tc - Ta) / (D2 - D1) where Ta is air temperature from weather, D1 and D2 are phenology baselines from BioOrchestrator.
